arts.ttl: Honest Ahanor: The Genoa gem attracting Juventus’ Interest
arts.sum: Honest Ahanor, a 16-year-old rising star from Genoa, is already making waves in Italian football and catching the eye of top clubs. Born in Aversa, Campania, on February 23, 2008, to Nigerian parents, Ahanor is a versatile defender with a bright future ahead. Calciomercato detail how Ahanor’s journey with Genoa began at the tender age of 5, and he has been steadily progressing through the club’s youth ranks ever since. His breakthrough came last season when he played a crucial role in Genoa’s Under-18 Scudetto victory, showcasing his talents as a left-sided player. arts.ttl: Fiorentina’s Gudmundsson case: Pradé explains agreement with Genoa
arts.sum: Fiorentina’s sporting director Daniele Pradé has addressed the ongoing legal situation surrounding their new signing Albert Gudmundsson. The Icelandic forward is currently involved in a legal process in his home country, facing accusations of “sexual misconduct” stemming from an incident in the summer of 2023. Calciomercato report that Gudmundsson has been in Reykjavik this week for the first hearing of the trial. The case, which was initially closed in February, was reopened following an appeal by the complainant’s lawyers. Pradé took the opportunity to explain the agreements in place with Genoa regarding this situation.
